method: Rendered the rebuilt 22-page PDF with pdftoppm at 110 DPI after tightening the Marchenko-Pastur/null-model caveat in the spectral section. Verified pdfinfo reports 22 letter pages and pdffonts reports no Type 3 fonts. Visually inspected the full-paper contact sheet plus the changed spectral pages at full size. Citations, figure labels, tables, and path references are legible and no clipping, overlap, blank page, duplicate URL, or alignment defects were observed.
